overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a fog-shrouded residential street. The atmosphere is thick with dense fog limiting visibility to create a tense, mysterious mood as the character explores the empty urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with stone wall and house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy street beside a stone retaining wall and two-story house

entered.detail: two-story residential house with white wooden siding and dark shutters visible through fog
tall weathered stone wall running along the sidewalk with graffiti markings
leafy trees visible through the fog behind the wall
blue newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk
yellow newspaper vending machine next to the blue one

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a fog-shrouded residential street, passing a stone retaining wall and a two-story white house. Two newspaper vending machines, one blue and one yellow, stand on the right sidewalk as the character moves forward through the thick fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy intersection with utility poles and overhead wires

events.description: moving from residential wall area into open intersection with utility poles

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the foggy intersection, navigating between utility poles and overhead wires

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars emerging from the fog
network of electrical wires stretching between poles across the street
yellow diamond-shaped pedestrian crossing sign on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide foggy intersection dominated by wooden utility poles and crisscrossing overhead power lines. The residential wall and house fade behind as the street opens up, with a yellow pedestrian sign visible on the right through the dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: dead end street approaching large concrete retaining wall

events.description: large concrete wall emerges from the fog, blocking the path ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a massive concrete wall covered in dark stains and graffiti, slowing as the path ends

entered.detail: massive vertical concrete retaining wall blocking the street, covered in water stains and weathering
white graffiti markings and tags spray-painted on the concrete wall surface
yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the wall
chain link fence running along the top edge of the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a dead end where a massive concrete retaining wall looms through the fog, covered in graffiti and water stains. A yellow fire hydrant stands on the left sidewalk as the street terminates at this imposing barrier, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a fog-shrouded residential neighborhood that gradually tightens into a claustrophobic dead end. It begins with the character walking past a stone retaining wall and a white two-story house, passing blue and yellow newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk. As the character moves forward, the residential scenery fades and the street opens into a wide intersection dominated by wooden utility poles and a network of overhead power lines. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a yellow pedestrian sign, moving deeper into the haze until the road terminates. Finally, the open intersection gives way to a massive, graffiti-covered concrete retaining wall that looms over a yellow fire hydrant, sealing off the path.
